description*.en: "Short-Range Order Parameter" is the fraction of the nearest-neighbor atom pairs in an Ising ferromagnet having magnetic moments in one direction, minus the fraction having magnetic moments in the opposite direction.

title: ShortRangeOrderParameter
description: "Short-Range Order Parameter" is the fraction of the nearest-neighbor atom pairs in an Ising ferromagnet having magnetic moments in one direction, minus the fraction having magnetic moments in the opposite direction.
